zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowant於1452年6月7日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蕾托 哈伍德時，他的父親Sir Richard Pigot51歲，母親Joan Darrel48歲。他於1474年1月14日與Alionore de Puttenham在英國巴金哈姆爾文格拉福結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1493年12月27日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿斯頓 盧萬特享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowant于1452年6月7日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾蕾托 哈伍德时，他的父亲Sir Richard Pigot51岁，母亲Joan Darrel48岁。他于1474年1月14日与Alionore de Puttenham在英国巴金哈姆爾文格拉福结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1493年12月27日在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿斯頓 盧萬特享年41岁。

German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowant was born on 7 June 1452, in Little Harwood, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Pigot, was 51 and his mother, Joan Darrel, was 48. He married Alionore de Puttenham on 14 January 1474, in Wingrave, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 December 1493, in Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowant est né le 7 juin 1452, à Little Harwood, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Pigot, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joan Darrel, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Alionore de Puttenham le 14 janvier 1474, à Wingrave, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1493, à Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowantが1452年6月7日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアリットル ハーウッドで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Pigotは51歳，母Joan Darrelは48歳であった。1474年1月14日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウィングラブでAlionore de Puttenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1493年12月27日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアストン ロワントで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowant(이)가 1452년 6월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리틀 하우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Pigot(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Darrel(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1474년 1월 14일 영국 벅잉함실르 윙레이브에서 Alionore de Puttenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 12월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 애스턴 로완트에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowant nasceu em 7 de junho de 1452, em Little Harwood, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Pigot, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joan Darrel, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Alionore de Puttenham em 14 de janeiro de 1474, em Wingrave, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1493, em Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard De Pigott Lord Aston Rowant родился 7 июня 1452 г. в местности литл харвуд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Pigot было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Darrel, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Alionore de Puttenham 14 января 1474 г. в местности винграв, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 декабря 1493 г. в местности астон роуант, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

Se casó con Alionore de Puttenham el 14 de enero de 1474, en Wingrave, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1493, en Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
